activities_projects.title: Plant Tissue Microscope Investigation
steps: Prepare a thin section of plant stem
Stain with safranin
Observe under microscope and identify tissues
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Distinguishes xylem, phloem and epidermal tissues

activities_projects.title: Meristem Growth Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand role of meristem in plant growth
steps: Place onion bulbs in jars with water
Cut root tip of one bulb after growth begins
Compare root growth over several days
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains role of meristem in growth

activities_projects.title: Plant vs Animal Tissue Analysis
steps: List major plant tissues
List major animal tissues
Prepare a detailed comparison chart

activities_projects.title: Complex Tissue Transport Model
steps: Draw a model showing water transport via xylem
Show food transport via phloem
Explain the pathway of transport
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of model and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Muscle Tissue Comparative Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze structural differences among muscle tissues
steps: Study diagrams of striated, smooth and cardiac muscles
Note differences in shape and nuclei
Prepare a comparison chart

activities_projects.title: Neuron Signal Flow Diagram
steps: Draw a neuron and indicate impulse direction
Label dendrite, cell body and axon
Explain signal transmission

activities_projects.title: Connective Tissue Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate the role of connective tissues in the body
steps: Select two connective tissues such as bone and cartilage
Explain their structure
Describe their role in body support

activities_projects.title: Tissue Organization Poster
activities_projects.objective: Understand organization of tissues into organs
steps: Illustrate the hierarchy: cell → tissue → organ → system
Give examples from plants and animals
Explain relationships

activities_projects.title: Epithelial Tissue Study
steps: Study squamous, cuboidal and columnar epithelium
Draw diagrams of each type
Explain where each occurs in the body

activities_projects.title: Tissue Function Research Report
activities_projects.objective: Research the importance of tissues in organisms
steps: Write a detailed report on plant and animal tissues
Include functions and examples
Summarize how tissues help organisms survive
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes the role of tissues in living organisms
